headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -177.9)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 123% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 162 quotes at peak intensity - 142 strong-intensity comments drove the score to near-record levels.

• This matches the highest frustration score in the 111-day range, showing people are as upset as they've been all period.

• Fears dropped sharply from yesterday's spike while optimism improved but remains well below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
